rules:
WE ARE NOT A HATE GROUP !!!
OUR TOP PRIORITY IS TO ASSIST VRChat USERS TO BUILD MENTAL AND EMOTIONAL RESILIENCE !!!

80% Of VrChat Users Love Us And 20% Of Them Hate Us, And We Are PROUD Of That Ratio !!! VrChat Has Made It Possible For Us To Be The #1 Fastest Growing TRENDSETTING Community Of ALL TIME.
We Are Extremely Controversial And We encourage our Members to engage in Cutting Edge Debates and HIGHLY Controversial Discussions Regularly !!!
We want to clarify that while participating, individuals are accountable for their emotional responses. Please note that disregarding this warning does not exempt anyone from the community's non-responsibility clause, as these discussions are typically accessible to the public. Our rules include prohibiting the sexualization of children, making pedophilic jokes. You MUST be 18 years or older to join our events. DISCLAIMER: The Jungle Community And The Official VrChat Moderation Staff Team Are Both NOT legally responsible for anyone who misrepresents their age either verbally or through vrchat age verification process.
Additionally, we request that If you are having an issue with ANY Members Or Moderators We Strongly Suggest You Utilize Your Ingame Tools,
Because as a VRC User, YOU HAVE THE RIGHT TO DO THE FOLLOWING :
-Block The User
-Mute The User
-Turn Users Voice Volume To The Lowest Level
-Initiate A Vote Kick On The User
-Contact The Human Resource Department Of Our Community!!!
Our aim is to foster resilience in navigating emotionally charged dialogues and controversial viewpoints SAFELY !!!
Simply put - when you enter a Jungle Event youre NOT IN KANSAS ANYMORE Come on in and enjoy the ride. WELCOME TO THE JUNGLE!!!
